name: harness
description: Agent Team & Skill Architect for Codex. Designs agent teams, Codex skills, orchestration prompts, and repository harness structure for a domain or project.

interface.shortDescription: Build a Codex-ready agent harness for this repo.
interface.longDescription: Ports revfactory/harness into Codex conventions. It designs specialized agent roles, maps them onto Codex delegation patterns, and scaffolds reusable skills and orchestration docs for the current project.
defaultPrompt: Build a harness for this project
Design an agent team for this domain
Set up a Codex harness here
